usage: AgentAZClaw hero image — three ravens as Architect/Developer/Reviewer, dissolving into orchestration diagrams
concept: Three ravens on oak branches. Left raven (Architect) dissolves into flowchart blocks. Center raven (Developer) dissolves into code syntax tree. Right raven (Reviewer) dissolves into checklist/validation marks. The oak trunk becomes a round-robin sequence diagram. Memories represented as acorns stored in labeled tree hollows.
prompt: A magnificent 18th century natural history engraving of three common ravens (Corvus corax) perched on the thick branches of an ancient gnarled English oak, rendered in extremely fine black ink cross-hatching on pure white background, wide 16:9 landscape format. The LEFT raven faces right with beak open, calling — labeled THE ARCHITECT in tiny copperplate script below. Its tail feathers and lower body gradually dissolve into clean architectural flowchart blocks connected by precise right-angle arrows, each block containing miniature parallel dashes suggesting text. The CENTER raven perches highest, head down examining something gripped in its claw — labeled THE DEVELOPER. Its wing feathers dissolve into branching abstract syntax tree nodes, with curly-brace shapes emerging naturally from feather barbs. The RIGHT raven hunches forward with piercing analytical eye — labeled THE REVIEWER. Its breast feathers dissolve into rows of checkmark and cross symbols arranged in a validation matrix grid. The massive oak trunk below all three ravens transforms gradually from deeply textured bark into a vertical sequence diagram: three parallel lifelines with horizontal arrows labeled ROUND 1, ROUND 2, ROUND N connecting between them, representing the round-robin orchestration loop. Scattered in hollows of the trunk are small acorn-like objects with tiny title labels — these are stored memories, the tree itself is the persistent memory store. Between the ravens, thin elegant curved connection lines arc through the air carrying labels: RECALL with a return arrow, REMEMBER with a storage arrow, READ with a file icon. The dissolution from biological to technical is seamless — identical line weight, identical hand-engraved precision throughout. Where feathers become diagrams is beautifully ambiguous. At the very bottom in microscopic copperplate: AgentAZClaw. Pure black ink on pure white background. No color. No grey wash. No sepia. No cream tint. Stark black on absolute white. Museum-quality copperplate engraving meets distributed systems architecture.
